mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name, version, status, deactivated_at FROM users ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name, version, status, deactivated_at) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.email}, #{row.passwordHash}, #{row.displayName}, #{row.version}, #{row.status}, #{row.deactivatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{row.displayName}, status = #{row.status}, deactivated_at = #{row.deactivatedAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id}
